Comment.value: This script clones a specific Page items and all of its Modifiers, Tags, Texts, Media, Lists, IO Values
This script requires that the active record is the current page item that is going to be cloned. This script is called from: Clone Content MASTER or Clone PAge SRV

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id )& SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; $new_pg_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_pi_id" ; $old_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_sortindex" ; $new_sortindex )
Find the Page item
Save current data

Calculation.Text: Case ( $clone_level= "Page item" And Not IsEmpty($suffix) ; TF PI Text 1::Text & " " & $suffix ; TF PI Text 1::Text)

Comment.value: Video with subtitles always uses media 1 field
Update cloned record with new data
Check if parent is a proxy page (Slide) - fix sort index

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Text 1 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Text 2 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Text 3 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Text 4 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Text 5 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Text 6 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Text 7 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Media 1 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id )

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Media 2 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id )

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Media 1 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id )

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Media 2 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id )

Comment.value: Cloning Texts for SPRIG STORY that uses page item as parent

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "old_parent_id" ; $old_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_parent_id" ; $new_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_code" ; $localisation_code ) & SetProperty ( "omit_type" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id )

Comment.value: Video with subtitles always uses media 1 field
Cloning Texts for Media with subtitles etc that uses Media 1 as parent

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "old_parent_id" ; $old_subtitle_media_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_parent_id" ; $new_subtitle_media_id ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_code" ; $localisation_code ) & SetProperty ( "omit_type" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id )

Comment.value: Cloning Media for SPRIG STORY, etc that uses page item as parent - this script also clones media subtitles if video sprig

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "old_parent_id" ; $old_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_parent_id" ; $new_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_code" ; $localisation_code ) & SetProperty ( "omit_type" ; "page-item" ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id )

Comment.value: Cloning a Quiz - we only clone the page item but not children.
Add to content overview

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_pi_id )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_pi_id )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_pi_id )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_pi_id )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_pi_id )

Comment.value: Point to the new block created earlier in Clone Title
Find the cloned block
Point to the block with the same block template in the "Move to Title"
Find the block based on the same template in the new title

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::List id) And ($isClonedTitle Or PatternCount($clone_settings; "Lists"))

Comment.value: Find or create a cloned list

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_list_id" ; $old_list_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id )

Comment.value: -------- Do not alter Legacy IO Arrays - that will be done from Start cloning script afterwards ---

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::IO id Legacy) And IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::IO id array Legacy ) And ($isClonedTitle Or PatternCount($clone_settings; "IOs"))

Comment.value: Find the cloned Legacy IO

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "old_io_id" ; $old_io_id)
Not IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::IO id array Legacy ) And ($isClonedTitle Or PatternCount($clone_settings; "IOs"))

Comment.value: If there is data in field "IO id array legacy" - the content in "IO id Legacy" will not be used in JSON.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_pi_id" ; $old_pi_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_pi_id" ; $new_pi_id )
